name: Melt-in-Your-Mouth Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:25
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the margarine (or butter) and sugar; add flour, vanilla, pecans, and salt. Mix well.
2. Roll dough into 1-inch balls and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
3. Bake in a preheated 325-degree oven for 17-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. Cool cookies slightly before rolling them in confectioner's sugar.
